topRepairTargets: timeout-resource-envelope: shorten prompt/lower output burden before changing gates
fact-citation robustness: whyThisWasFlagged/evidenceSummary cited unsupported or unknown facts in observed output
omit-or-shrink narrative burden: whatHappened became low-information/duplicate in observed output
non-negotiable safety: generated-evidence wording was observed and must remain fail-closed
privacyBoundary: Raw prompts, raw model responses, and raw server logs were not persisted by this harness.
diagnosticLimit: Only 2/8 raw responses completed before timeout; raw responses were not persisted.
